label: Message to the Hiring Team
value: I am excited to apply for the Software Engineer, AI Solutions(Contarct-12 Months) role at Jobs. My background in JavaScript, React, Next.js and my focus on becoming a strong Software Enginnering make this opportunity especially compelling to me. I would be glad to contribute to Jobs's team with a practical, detail-oriented approach to building reliable backend systems and supporting product delivery in onsite engineering environments. With my academic foundation and hands-on project work, I am confident I can add value while continuing to grow in a role aligned with Bengluru opportunities.

label: Why are you interested in this role?
value: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a strong Software Enginnering and uses skills I have practiced through projects and coursework.

label: What makes you a match?
value: My background in JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js closely matches the expectations in this job description.
